title: lamium garganicum subsp. laevigatum
intro: Lamium garganicum subsp. laevigatum, also known as spotted deadnettle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lamium garganicum subsp. laevigatum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
